name: Inplace
description: Inplace provides an easy to do editing and display at the same time where clicking the output displays the actual content.

props.name: active
props.description: Whether the content is displayed or not.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the element should be disabled.

props.name: displayProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to display container.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: open
events.description: Callback to invoke when inplace is opened.

events.name: close
events.description: Callback to invoke when inplace is closed.

slots.name: content
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Close message function. */ closeCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
